title: FOX PLUSHIES!!!!!
description: adds really cute fox plushies to the game that you can hug :3
body:
adds a cute loveable fox plushie to the game that you can snuggle in your arms :3
![image of player holding plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5VA75J1j/images/d4e332dac6d421d89ec73564558812c9471be5d9.png)
